instruction: Change the text color in the textboxes to on slide 1 yellow, red, and green, respectively, in top-to-bottom order. Use exactly these colors—no variations (e.g., no dark red, light green, etc.).

evaluator.eval: compare_pptx_files(get_vm_file(env, config={'path': '/home/user/Desktop/45_2.pptx', 'dest': '45_2.pptx'}), get_cloud_file(env, config={'path': 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/xlangai/ubuntu_osworld_file_cache/resolve/main/libreoffice_impress/04578141-1d42-4146-b9cf-6fab4ce5fd74/45_2_Gold.pptx', 'dest': '45_2_Gold.pptx'})) or compare_pptx_files(get_vm_file(env, config={'path': '/home/user/Desktop/45_2.pptx', 'dest': '45_2.pptx'}), get_cloud_file(env, config={'path': 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/xlangai/ubuntu_osworld_file_cache/resolve/main/libreoffice_impress/04578141-1d42-4146-b9cf-6fab4ce5fd74/45_2_Gold_all_fonts.pptx', 'dest': '45_2_Gold_All_fonts.pptx'}))
